Debug Agent.role: Diagnose build, type-check, lint, and runtime blockers before downstream work.

Video Retrieval Agent.role: Collect authorized/open-source/user-provided short-video candidates and filter them for Douyin-compatible vertical format.

Video Import Agent.role: Prepare and validate the real manifest import flow for posts6.json-compatible data.

Video Stack Insert Agent.role: Insert selected videos into the recommendation stack with stable random ordering and idempotency.

Beauty Specialist Agent.role: Pin and validate the foundation-review beauty UP-style video in the second feed slot.

UI Design Agent.role: Maintain the share-sheet 入口 button placement, visual fit, and route behavior.

Share Entry Verification Agent.role: Verify the share button opens the expected panel and the 入口 action routes correctly.

Docs Agent.role: Document the workflow, commands, manifest format, validation steps, and limitations.

Review Agent.role: Review final code, data flow, safety, and validation results.

tasks.goal: Run project health checks first and separate historical issues from new multi-agent work.
acceptance: Run npm run build and record result.
Run npm run type-check and classify existing errors versus new errors.
Run focused ESLint on touched multi-agent files.

notes.note: build passed with existing libarchive-wasm browser externalized warnings; focused lint passed; type-check still fails on existing project type debt and does not list current touched files.
notes.output: npm run build; npm run type-check; focused eslint

tasks.goal: Retrieve or select a large set of high-quality Douyin-compatible short-video candidates from authorized sources, including a required beauty ratio and at least one foundation-review UP-style video.
acceptance: Support authorized/user-provided candidate manifests.
Support optional open API discovery with PEXELS_API_KEY and rate limiting.
Filter for vertical videos, preferably 1080x1920 or equivalent 9:16.
Enforce a configurable beauty-video ratio.
Require at least one fixedSecond foundation-review candidate.

tasks.goal: Prepare and validate the real manifest import flow without mutating posts6.json until a real manifest is provided.
acceptance: Dry-run works without mutating posts6.json.
Importer validates id, videoUrl, coverUrl, and vertical dimensions.
Repeated imports are idempotent by aweme_id.

tasks.goal: Ensure pressing the right-side share button opens the bottom share panel with a first bottom-stack action named 入口.
acceptance: The 入口 action appears before 转发 in video mode.
Clicking 入口 closes the sheet and routes to /shop/debate.
Existing share actions keep their behavior and order after the inserted entry.

tasks.goal: Randomly insert selected candidate videos into the original recommendation display stack while preserving idempotency.
acceptance: Ordinary videos are inserted in stable random-looking order.
The original stack is preserved except for intended insertions and de-duplication.
Rerunning the same manifest does not duplicate videos.

tasks.goal: Guarantee one foundation-review beauty UP-style video is pinned at feed index 1.
acceptance: fixedSecond: true wins when present.
Fallback chooses 粉底液/底妆/美妆测评 content when no fixedSecond exists.
Second-slot logic does not duplicate the pinned item.

tasks.goal: Verify the screenshot flow: right-side share button opens the panel, then the bottom button stack includes 入口 in the first position.
acceptance: The share trigger still opens the same dark share panel.
The first bottom action is 入口.
The route /shop/debate is reachable.

tasks.goal: Document how to use and develop the multi-agent workflow for debug, retrieval, import, insertion, UI entry, beauty pinning, docs, and review.
acceptance: Dispatcher commands are documented.
Video retrieval and import commands are documented.
Known limitations and verification steps are documented.

tasks.goal: Independently review the final implementation for correctness, safety, and delivery readiness.
acceptance: No critical or high severity issues remain.
Build and focused lint results are reported.
Any residual type-check, dependency, or video-source risks are explicitly documented.
